retry_reason: Failure occurs when no device matches the name; the device may not exist yet, but retrying is not a requirement of the wrapper.
contract_summary: This wrapper acquires a reference on a device found by name. It calls bus_find_device with device_match_name as the match function. If a matching device exists, it returns the device with an incremented reference count; the caller must release the reference via put_device when done. If no device is found, returns NULL. The caller must check the return value to avoid dereferencing NULL.
